name: ultimate-frontend-design
description: Complete frontend design plugin for Claude Code. Ships TWO skills: (1) ultimate-frontend-design, 20 core sections + 17 reference files covering visual hierarchy, typography, color, motion, accessibility, mobile patterns, 3D & immersive web, modern CSS 2024-2026, performance, and design psychology, scored 0-10 with a weighted rubric. v2.2 adds a curated design-ecosystem reference (impeccable, design-council, kami, gsap-skills, awesome-claude-design, animations.dev, Aceternity, Design Arena, Joshua Stevenson and Kyle Whitrow CC marketplace), full pbakaus/impeccable integration guide (23 commands + anti-patterns), and ahmad personal style rules (palette ban + UI copy tone). (2) claude-design-systems, DESIGN.md contract pattern, Jens Heitmann three systems, Nano Banana 2 visual workflow, and premium build playbooks for using Claude Code itself as a project-wide design system.
author: ahmadmosama
